source_pr.title: executor: accelerate TestUpdateScanningHandles and TestIssue20658 and TestParallelStreamAggGroupConcat
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: #24130 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

1. using batch insert instead of  insert one by one
2. reduce the unit test size, from 10000 to 1000

Before:
```
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestIssue20658
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        18.889s
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestParallelStreamAggGroupConcat
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        12.697s
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f  TestUpdateScanningHandles
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        12.697s
```

After
```
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestIssue20658
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        4.868s
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestParallelStreamAggGroupConcat
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        4.358s
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f  TestUpdateScanningHandles
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        5.962s
```

### Related changes



### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR accelerates several executor tests by reducing test data size and using batch inserts. The patch is a performance optimization and does not provide enough evidence of a specific flaky root cause.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
